_meta.authored_from: Swift MediaLibraryStore.normalizedShowTitle (apple Sources/EmeraldKit/State/MediaLibraryStore.swift ~L66) + its inline vector pin Tests/EmeraldKitTests/NormalizedShowTitleVectorTests.swift (apple 09dd5fe)
_meta.author: ChrisPachulski
_meta.purpose: Cross-language pin for the last-resort show-title join key ('The American Experiment' incident). The Swift MediaLibraryStore.normalizedShowTitle and Rust media_core::filename::normalize_show_name compute the SAME join key independently and were coupled only by a doc comment; the trailing-year strip was fixed independently in BOTH on the same day (apple 6368b8d, server dd7a817) because nothing pinned it. This file freezes the input->key contract so a unilateral tweak on either side goes red before it can silently desync the join.
_meta.contract: Swift MediaLibraryStore.normalizedShowTitle and Rust media_core::filename::normalize_show_name must produce the same key for every vector and equivalence class. Both normalizers case-fold, remove diacritics, expand '&' to 'and', split non-alphanumeric punctuation, strip one trailing 1900-2099 year only when another title token remains, and collapse whitespace.
